title: Doubly Robust Distributionally Robust Off-Policy Evaluation and Learning
authors: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: The paper proposes a doubly robust approach for distributionally robust off-policy evaluation and learning, addressing the challenge of discrepancies between training and deployment environments.

methodology.problem: Estimating/maximizing worst-case returns over environments within an uncertainty set around the unknown training environment
methodology.approach: Doubly robust approach that combines propensity modeling with expected reward modeling

contributions: Proposes a doubly robust approach for distributionally robust OPE/L
Improves upon SNIPS-based methods by addressing propensity estimation issues
Achieves better statistical properties including N-consistency, asymptotic linearity, and efficiency
